hero.name: Anouar Dia'a Eddine
hero.bio: I craft brands, websites, and digital experiences for ambitious companies. Founder of a creative studio where design meets engineering — building work that feels inevitable, premium, and unmistakably yours.

about.title: Designing the gap between idea and impact
about.desc: A multidisciplinary designer and developer with a decade of turning early-stage brands into recognizable, trusted names.
about.storyBody: I am a graphic designer, web developer, and the founder of a digital creative agency. For nearly a decade I have lived at the intersection of visual design and engineering — translating brand ambition into work that is both beautiful and built to last.
about.whatBody: From logo and identity systems to production-grade React websites, I lead projects end-to-end. Strategy, design, development, and launch — one coherent voice, one accountable partner.
about.whyBody: Because the work ships. Because it performs. And because every detail — from kerning to Core Web Vitals — is treated as a craft decision, not an afterthought.
about.missionText: To help ambitious brands look, feel, and perform like the category leaders they deserve to be.
about.visionText: A world where every great idea has design and engineering worthy of it — accessible and premium.
about.valuesText: Craft over noise. Clarity over clutter. Long-term partnerships over quick wins.
about.journeyDesc: The path from designer to founder — each step adding a new discipline.
